title: phanera carcinophylla
intro: Phanera carcinophylla, also known as the Asian rattan cane or Phanera palm, is a type of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phanera carcinophylla include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Phanera carcinophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional folk remedies and Ayurvedic medicine.
